focus_points.label: Decision rights and expectations in cross-functional work.
focus_points.reason: Whether the scope and decision rights are still fuzzy when priorities conflict, and what “good” looks like for her in those moments.

focus_points.label: Running alignment without over-indexing on consensus.
focus_points.reason: How she should handle partner expectations when tradeoffs are needed—what to push for, what to escalate, and when to decide rather than keep seeking agreement.

focus_points.label: What support and boundaries she needs from you.
focus_points.reason: What she would want more of from you right now so she stops spending energy decoding unspoken norms and can run planning threads with clearer guardrails.

focus_points.label: How she’s landing with partners day to day.
focus_points.reason: How she’s building trust and comfort with cross-functional partners so she can surface friction early without waiting for consensus to form.
